notes: v0.29.1 — Bullets spawn at cannon tip (radius*2.2 forward, very obvious on LANCE LONG CANNON) instead of inside the hull. Trails emit from engine ports (back of ship, opposite of aim). LOCKER composite ship-preview now reads the preview helper too — clicking an unowned ship skin actually shows that skin. Currency colours fixed: PULSE = cyan, SURGE = gold. Default-unlocked projectiles + trails merged back into saved unlocks on load (no more FREE buyables in the shop). Shop got its own toast banner so buy/equip clicks aren't silent. Shop mockup variants ship in v0.29.2.
